title: Les Grands Mutiles
content:
I saw three wounded of the war:
     And the first had lost his eyes;
     And the second went on wheels and had
     No legs below the thighs;
     And the face of the third was featureless,
     And his mouth ran cornerwise.
     So I made a rhyme about each one,
     And this is how my fancies run.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert William Service, titled "Les Grands Mutiles", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
